description: On multi-flyby missions like Cassini, the CAPCOM event ticker shows every flyby as the generic label "FLYBY" with an empty note — even though the mission data (flight.events) carries specific per-event labels such as "Venus #1 — gravity assist" and "Saturn orbit insertion", plus multi-sentence descriptions. The rich per-event text is present in the data but never reaches the ticker. Expected: when an event supplies its own label/description, use those; fall back to the generic type-based label/note only when the event doesn't. Event severity/colour should stay driven by the event type.
